Themes Manager

Swap and configure your public storefront templates. OpenCMS theme engines compile styles, header systems, and typography grids on the fly.

Developer Desk

Custom Extensions Portal

For local directory drop, drag your folder directly into:
packages/themes/custom/<theme-slug>/
Ensure your folder has a valid manifest.json in its root. It will display here automatically!

Drag and drop Theme ZIP archiveor click to browse your desktop (ZIP format only)
